import { createHotContext as __vite__createHotContext } from "/@vite/client";import.meta.hot = __vite__createHotContext("/src/app/pages/platform-admin/TenantGovernance.tsx");import { jsxDEV } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-jsx-dev-runtime";
import * as RefreshRuntime from "/@react-refresh";
const inWebWorker = typeof WorkerGlobalScope !== "undefined" && self instanceof WorkerGlobalScope;
let prevRefreshReg;
let prevRefreshSig;
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  if (!window.$RefreshReg$) {
    throw new Error(
      "@vitejs/plugin-react can't detect preamble. Something is wrong."
    );
  }
  prevRefreshReg = window.$RefreshReg$;
  prevRefreshSig = window.$RefreshSig$;
  window.$RefreshReg$ = RefreshRuntime.getRefreshReg("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/platform-admin/TenantGovernance.tsx");
  window.$RefreshSig$ = RefreshRuntime.createSignatureFunctionForTransform;
}
var _s = $RefreshSig$();
import { FGCmp } from "/@id/fginspector";
import { useState } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-base";
import { Plus, Search, MoreVertical, Building, Users, FileText, DollarSign, X, Tag } from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/lucide-react.js?v=25293e4c";
import TenantDetailModal from "/src/app/components/TenantDetailModal.tsx";
const mockTenants = [
  { id: "1", name: "Acme Healthcare", sector: "Healthcare", jurisdiction: "US", plan: "Enterprise", status: "active", policyCount: 145, userCount: 52, tags: ["Aged Care", "NDIS", "Priority"] },
  { id: "2", name: "TechStart Inc", sector: "Technology", jurisdiction: "UK", plan: "Professional", status: "active", policyCount: 89, userCount: 28, tags: ["SaaS", "B2B"] },
  { id: "3", name: "Global Retail Co", sector: "Retail", jurisdiction: "AU", plan: "Enterprise", status: "active", policyCount: 178, userCount: 94, tags: ["Retail", "Multi-site"] },
  { id: "4", name: "EduLearn Academy", sector: "Education", jurisdiction: "CA", plan: "Basic", status: "trial", policyCount: 34, userCount: 12, tags: ["Education", "New"] },
  { id: "5", name: "FinanceHub Ltd", sector: "Finance", jurisdiction: "SG", plan: "Enterprise", status: "active", policyCount: 203, userCount: 67, tags: ["Finance", "Compliance", "Priority"] }
];
export default function TenantGovernance() {
  _s();
  const [tenants, setTenants] = useState(mockTenants);
  const [showCreateModal, setShowCreateModal] = useState(false);
  const [selectedTenant, setSelectedTenant] = useState(null);
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState("");
  const [selectedTag, setSelectedTag] = useState("");
  const [showTagModal, setShowTagModal] = useState(false);
  const [newTenant, setNewTenant] = useState({
    name: "",
    adminName: "",
    adminEmail: "",
    contactNumber: "",
    address: "",
    sector: "",
    jurisdiction: "",
    language: "en",
    plan: "Professional",
    environment: ""
  });
  const allTags = Array.from(new Set(tenants.flatMap((t) => t.tags || [])));
  const filteredTenants = tenants.filter((tenant) => {
    const matchesSearch = tenant.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) || tenant.sector.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) || (tenant.tags || []).some((tag) => tag.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()));
    const matchesTag = !selectedTag || (tenant.tags || []).includes(selectedTag);
    return matchesSearch && matchesTag;
  });
  const handleCreateTenant = () => {
    const tenant = {
      id: String(tenants.length + 1),
      name: newTenant.name,
      sector: newTenant.sector,
      jurisdiction: newTenant.jurisdiction,
      plan: newTenant.plan,
      status: "trial",
      policyCount: 0,
      userCount: 1
    };
    setTenants([...tenants, tenant]);
    setShowCreateModal(false);
    setNewTenant({ name: "", adminName: "", adminEmail: "", contactNumber: "", address: "", sector: "", jurisdiction: "", language: "en", plan: "Professional", environment: "" });
  };
